steps.title: Read the frequency table to identify which values appear in the dataset
steps.content:
A frequency of 0 means that value does not appear in the dataset. Reading the table from top to bottom:
  • Data values 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12 all have frequencies > 0
  • Data value 13 has frequency 0 — it does NOT appear
  • Data value 14 has frequency 6 — it DOES appear
The dataset includes only the values with positive frequencies.

steps.title: Identify the maximum data value
steps.content:
The maximum data value is the largest value in the table that actually appears in the dataset (frequency > 0).

Scanning the data value column from highest to lowest: 14 is the largest value, and it has frequency 6, confirming it appears in the dataset.

The answer is 14. — 14 is correct.
